Uses of Class
gov.cdc.izgateway.ads.MetadataBuilder

Package
Description
gov.cdc.izgateway.ads
 

  • Uses of MetadataBuilder in gov.cdc.izgateway.ads

    Methods in gov.cdc.izgateway.ads that return MetadataBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MetadataBuilder
    MetadataBuilder.setDestinationId(String destinationId)
    Set the intended destination for the report.
    MetadataBuilder
    MetadataBuilder.setFilename(String filename)
    Set the filename of the report The filename structure is well defined for each report type and is used to valid metadata parameters.
    MetadataBuilder
    MetadataBuilder.setFileSize(long size)
    Set the file size
    MetadataBuilder
    MetadataBuilder.setMessageId(String messageId)
    Set messageId from passed in messageId value.
    MetadataBuilder
    MetadataBuilder.setPeriod(String period)
    Set the period associated with the report
    MetadataBuilder
    MetadataBuilder.setProvenance(String facilityId, gov.cdc.izgateway.logging.event.TransactionData transactionData)
    Set the provenance of the report
    MetadataBuilder
    MetadataBuilder.setReportType(String reportType)
    Set the report type and compute all derived metadata fields from it.
    MetadataBuilder
    MetadataBuilder.setRouteId(gov.cdc.izgateway.service.IDestinationService dests, String routeId)
    Set the route identifier
